renderContract.geometry: shared outward-wound 64 x 32 UV sphere algorithm and 96-segment floor disc
renderContract.camera: scene-contract.json schema 1; Blender evaluated matrix_world and 50 degree vertical FOV
renderContract.lighting: shared linear studio EXR at 0.18 strength plus three matched directional lights
renderContract.environment: studio-environment.exr; solid camera background, HDR reflections only
renderContract.webBackend: WebGLRenderer with offline-generated official MaterialX 1.39.4 ESSL
renderContract.webEnvironment: MaterialX FIS over a trilinear lat-long radiance mip chain at 16 samples per pixel plus a separate third-order SH irradiance EXR
renderContract.directLights: scene-contract.json evaluated Sun local -Z propagation vectors; generated directional NodeDef negates LightData.direction to surface-to-light L
renderContract.directionalDiagnostics: light-{key,fill,rim}-{blender,web}.png; one light at a time, zero environment strength, zero Sun angular radius
renderContract.coordinateDiagnostic: coordinate-cardinals-web.png; columns +X, +Z, -X, -Z; radiance top and direct lights bottom
renderContract.uiNormalBandDiagnostic: ui-normal-band-{blender,web}.png; identity-transform Normal/Mapping/CONSTANT-ramp/typed-col branch with explicit normal-space and emission surface substitutes

uiNormalBandDiagnostic.claim: branch-semantic diagnostic only; transformed world-normal semantics, source color-to-Surface coercion, and native USD extraction remain parity blockers

interpretation: Image metrics include expected Eevee/Three BRDF, shadow, and light-unit differences. Graph-semantic support is reported separately in manifest.json and is not inferred from these pixels.
